Bash(cd "D:\\Source\\Repos\\cclautert\\AgripeWeb" && python3 -c "
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
tree = ET.parse\('TestResults/103754bf-040f-4535-9226-2d1a3ed37ef2/coverage.cobertura.xml'\)
root = tree.getroot\(\)
results = []
for pkg in root.findall\('.//package'\):
    for cls in pkg.findall\('.//class'\):
        name = cls.get\('name'\)
        fname = cls.get\('filename'\)
        lr = float\(cls.get\('line-rate', '0'\)\)
        lines = cls.findall\('.//line'\)
        total = len\(lines\)
        covered = sum\(1 for l in lines if int\(l.get\('hits','0'\)\) > 0\)
        uncovered = total - covered
        if uncovered > 0:
            results.append\(\(uncovered, name, fname, lr, total, covered\)\)
results.sort\(reverse=True\)
for unc, name, fname, lr, total, covered in results[:25]:
    print\(f'{unc:4d} uncovered | {lr:.0%} | {fname}:{name}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:\\Source\\Repos\\cclautert\\AgripeWeb" && grep -o 'class name="[^"]*" filename="[^"]*" line-rate="[^"]*"' TestResults/103754bf-040f-4535-9226-2d1a3ed37ef2/coverage.cobertura.xml | sed 's/class name="//;s/" filename="/|/;s/" line-rate="/|/;s/"$//' | while IFS='|' read -r name file rate; do echo "$rate $file $name"; done | sort -n | head -25)
